description: Detailed resource on fostering open conversations, offering non-judgmental listening, and educating friends and family to support emotional needs in Tourette conversation settings.
title: LSN Blog - How to Help Someone with Tourette Syndrome

description: An under-development Tic Tracker App for Android from Neurotherapeutics, designed to help individuals with Tourette Syndrome track tics and triggers.
title: Tic Tracker App - Neurotherapeutics

description: Documentation from the Tourette Association explaining how Tic Journal serves as a reminder tool for managing tics, triggers, and premonitory urges with behavioral therapy integration.
title: Tic Journal Documentation - Tracking and Reminders

description: CDC guide on digital tools for Tourette syndrome, including Tic Journal as a reminder app for tracking tics and triggers with mobile accessibility.
title: Tic Journal - CDC Resource Guide

description: Official product page for the Tobii I-Series, an assistive communication device operated via eye tracking for nonverbal individuals.
title: Tobii I-Series  Eye Tracking Communication Device

description: Open-source repository for TicTimer, the tic tracking planning software released under a BSD 3-clause license. Contains full source code, issue tracking, and contribution guidelines.
title: TicTimer Source Code Repository

description: Google Play Store listing for TicTracker, providing tools to track tics, manage symptoms, and support sensory regulation strategies for individuals with Tourette syndrome.
title: TicTracker: Tic & Tourette Log (Google Play)

description: Medical article discussing management strategies for tics and Tourette syndrome, including the use of digital tracking tools and sensory regulation techniques.
title: Medscape: Managing Tics and Tourette Syndrome

description: Primary Apple App Store listing for Tic Journal, highlighting features for tracking tics, managing triggers, and gaining insights into daily experiences for neurodivergent users.
title: Tic Journal App on Apple

description: Apple Developer documentation page for Tic Journal, providing technical details and official description of the app's functionality for tic tracking and overload management.
title: Tic Journal - Apple Developer
